name: redundancy-nudge
prediction: when exact+near duplicate share of the live context exceeds CTX_REDUNDANCY_PCT (default 50), one cooldown-limited steer points the model at compact_context: compactions rise on redundant sessions, context.surface.duplication means fall after the nudge, pass rate neutral-to-up (contextops redundancy-signal port, 2026-07-20). context-dedup.nudge telemetry confirms firing; if sessions ignore the nudge (no compaction follows), reject.
